glosses.ja: 〜しなければならない; 〜しないといけない

sentences.target: Je dois finir ce rapport aujourd’hui.

translations.fr: Je dois finir ce rapport aujourd’hui.
translations.en: I have to finish this report today.
translations.es: Tengo que terminar este informe hoy.
translations.de: Ich muss den Bericht heute fertig machen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天得把这份报告完成。
translations.yue: 我今日要完成呢份報告。
translations.ru: Мне нужно закончить этот отчёт сегодня.
translations.pt: Eu tenho que terminar este relatório hoje.
translations.he: אני צריך לסיים את הדו״ח היום.
translations.vi: Tôi phải hoàn thành báo cáo này hôm nay.
translations.ar: يجب أن أنهي هذا التقرير اليوم.
translations.nl: Ik moet dit rapport vandaag afmaken.
translations.uk: Мені треба закінчити цей звіт сьогодні.
translations.hu: Ma be kell fejeznem ezt a jelentést.
translations.hi: मुझे आज यह रिपोर्ट खत्म करनी है।
translations.el: Πρέπει να τελειώσω αυτήν την αναφορά σήμερα.
translations.nb: Jeg må bli ferdig med denne rapporten i dag.
translations.id: Saya harus menyelesaikan laporan ini hari ini.
translations.sv: Jag måste bli klar med den här rapporten i dag.
translations.ro: Trebuie să termin acest raport astăzi.
translations.da: Jeg skal gøre denne rapport færdig i dag.
translations.fi: Minun pitää saada tämä raportti valmiiksi tänään.
translations.ja: 今日中にこのレポートを終わらせなければならない。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 1st person singular; expresses obligation and selects the infinitive 'finir' as its complement.
Infinitive lexical verb; non-finite complement (xcomp) of 'dois', denoting the action to be performed.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'rapport'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'finir'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verbal predicate to indicate time.

sentences.target: Tu dois appeler ta mère ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ty dwa aple ta mɛʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu dois appeler ta mère ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ty dwa aple ta mɛʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: You have to call your mom tonight.
translations.es: Tienes que llamar a tu mamá esta noche.
translations.de: Du musst deine Mutter heute Abend anrufen.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今晚得给你妈妈打电话。
translations.ru: Тебе нужно позвонить маме сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Você tem que ligar para sua mãe hoje à noite.
translations.he: אתה צריך להתקשר לאמא שלך הערב.
translations.vi: Tối nay bạn phải gọi cho mẹ.
translations.nl: Je moet vanavond je moeder bellen.
translations.uk: Ти маєш подзвонити мамі сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hu: Ma este fel kell hívnod az anyukádat.
translations.hi: तुम्हें आज रात अपनी माँ को फोन करना है।
translations.pl: Musisz zadzwonić do mamy dziś wieczorem.
translations.el: Πρέπει να τηλεφωνήσεις στη μαμά σου απόψε.
translations.nb: Du må ringe moren din i kveld.
translations.id: Kamu harus menelepon ibumu malam ini.
translations.sv: Du måste ringa din mamma i kväll.
translations.da: Du skal ringe til din mor i aften.
translations.fi: Sinun pitää soittaa äidillesi tänä iltana.
translations.ja: 今夜お母さんに電話しなきゃいけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 2nd person singular; expresses obligation and selects the infinitive 'appeler'.
Infinitive lexical verb; non-finite complement (xcomp) of 'dois'.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, feminine singular form; modifies 'mère'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'appeler'.
Demonstrative determiner; part of the temporal NP 'ce soir' used adverbially.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the temporal NP 'ce soir' functioning as an adverbial time modifier.

sentences.target: Il doit prendre le bus maintenant.

translations.fr: Il doit prendre le bus maintenant.
translations.en: He has to take the bus now.
translations.es: Tiene que tomar el autobús ahora.
translations.de: Er muss jetzt den Bus nehmen.
translations.ru: Ему нужно сейчас сесть на автобус.
translations.pt: Ele tem que pegar o ônibus agora.
translations.he: הוא צריך לקחת את האוטובוס עכשיו.
translations.vi: Anh ấy phải bắt xe buýt ngay bây giờ.
translations.nl: Hij moet nu de bus nemen.
translations.uk: Йому треба зараз сісти на автобус.
translations.pl: On musi teraz wsiąść do autobusu.
translations.el: Πρέπει να πάρει τώρα το λεωφορείο.
translations.ro: El trebuie să ia autobuzul acum.
translations.ja: 彼は今バスに乗らなければならない。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular; selects the infinitive 'prendre' to express obligation.
Infinitive lexical verb; non-finite complement (xcomp) of 'doit'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'bus'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'prendre'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause to indicate immediacy.

sentences.target: Nous devons acheter des billets aujourd’hui.

translations.fr: Nous devons acheter des billets aujourd’hui.
translations.en: We have to buy tickets today.
translations.es: Tenemos que comprar los billetes hoy.
translations.pt: Nós temos que comprar os bilhetes hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi phải mua vé.
translations.nb: Vi må kjøpe billetter i dag.
translations.id: Kita harus membeli tiket hari ini.
translations.sv: Vi måste köpa biljetter i dag.
translations.da: Vi skal købe billetter i dag.
translations.ja: 私たちは今日チケットを買わなければならない。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 1st person plural; takes 'acheter' as infinitival complement to express obligation.
Infinitive lexical verb; non-finite complement (xcomp) of 'devons'.
Indefinite plural article (determiner); introduces the plural noun 'billets'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'acheter'.
Temporal adverb; indicates when the action is to occur.

en: I have to finish this report today.
You have to call your mom tonight.
He has to take the bus now.
We have to buy tickets today.
